meta.feature: Learner reader app + answer-safe backend reads

tldr: A learner can now open a browser and read a published course end-to-end — catalog → syllabus → lesson with markdown and video — served by a new Next.js app that keeps the API token server-side. The backend also gained ?view=learner projections that provably strip every answer field.
headline: The two halves aren't connected yet — the reader still shows dummy quiz/practice/test data even though the safe real data is ready to serve.
why: This is the new arc from docs/roadmap-learner-app-and-content.md: after the backend arc (Phases A–F) finished the course domain, CLI, import pipeline, and REST API, there was no way for a student to consume a course. The arc chose a Bun + Next.js reader (superseding the old "Go-served htmx console" decision), with two guardrails: the API token never reaches the browser, and the learner path must never receive correct answers, reference solutions, or hidden test cases.

shipped.label: Phase L1 — the reader (CRS-66–75)
shipped.detail: A web/ workspace with App Router pages: a catalog showing only published courses, a course detail page with ordered syllabus, and a lesson reader rendering text blocks as sanitized markdown and video blocks as provider embeds. Quiz/practice and the course test render from clearly-labeled dummy data ("Sample data" badge) so L1 didn't block on backend work. All REST calls go through a typed server-only client (web/src/lib/course-api/); the token lives in COURSE_CLI_API_TOKEN, server-side only. Caching is on-demand via a secret-guarded /api/revalidate route. Loading/empty/not-found/error states exist on every route.

shipped.label: Phase L2 — learner-safe projections, backend half (CRS-76–81)
shipped.detail: The Go REST adapter now accepts ?view=learner on quiz, practice, and test detail reads. Learner responses omit CorrectIndices, pre-submit Explanation, practice Solution/TestCases/ExpectedStdout, TestSolution, and all choice/coding answer fields (full contract in docs/learner-safe-read-projections.md). Learner reads of unpublished courses return 404, so drafts don't even leak their existence. The BFF gained matching getLearnerQuiz/Practice/Test methods.

shipped.label: Planned but not shipped — the final handoff
shipped.detail: Swapping the reader's dummy activity cards for the real learner projections. The BFF methods exist but no component calls them; lesson-reader.tsx still renders DummyActivityCard.

nodes.label: Learner browser
nodes.detail: No API token ever reaches the browser; it receives HTML/RSC only.

nodes.label: Catalog (published only)
nodes.detail: Lists only published courses; drafts never appear.

nodes.label: /api/revalidate
nodes.detail: Secret-guarded route invalidates published content on republish — no timer.

nodes.label: Course detail + syllabus
nodes.detail: Ordered syllabus for a published course.

nodes.label: Lesson reader
nodes.detail: Renders text blocks as sanitized markdown and video blocks as provider embeds.

nodes.label: Course test view
nodes.detail: Renders the course test — currently from dummy data.

nodes.label: Sanitized markdown
nodes.detail: Text blocks rendered as sanitized markdown.

nodes.label: Provider embed
nodes.detail: Video blocks rendered as provider embeds.

nodes.label: DummyActivityCard (sample)
nodes.detail: Quiz/practice + the test still render clearly-labeled dummy data. The real safe data exists but nothing calls it yet.

nodes.label: Server-only API client
nodes.detail: Typed, server-only client. Token lives in COURSE_CLI_API_TOKEN — never in the browser. Already has getLearnerQuiz/Practice/Test methods.

nodes.label: Wire components to learner BFF
nodes.detail: PLANNED: replace buildDummyActivity in lesson-reader.tsx + the test view with the learner BFF methods. The only thing between demo and real product.

nodes.label: Go REST learner projections
nodes.detail: ?view=learner strips every answer field; provable via regression tests.

nodes.label: Answer fields stripped
nodes.detail: Omits CorrectIndices, pre-submit Explanation, practice Solution/TestCases/ExpectedStdout, TestSolution, and all choice/coding answer fields.

nodes.label: 404 — no draft leak
nodes.detail: Learner reads of unpublished courses return 404 — drafts don't leak their existence.

steps.text: Start the Go API (needs Postgres migrated and a published course — use the CLI/import pipeline).
In web/, set the env vars, then install and run the dev server.
steps.command: COURSE_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8788 COURSE_CLI_API_TOKEN=… COURSE_REVALIDATION_SECRET=… bun install && bun run dev

steps.text: Open the reader — only published courses show; click into a course, then a lesson; text and video render for real, quiz/practice show the 'Sample data' badge.
Prove answer safety directly — no CorrectIndices in the learner response; the same URL without ?view=learner returns full fidelity.
Republish a course, hit /api/revalidate with the secret, reload the catalog — content updates without a timer.

verify.testsProve: Go-side regression tests serialize learner responses and fail if any answer-bearing field name reappears (CRS-81). Web-side transport tests fail if a learner BFF method ever calls an instructor URL. A Phase L1 acceptance suite covers catalog → lesson rendering and route states.
verify.untested: The dummy→real swap path (it doesn't exist yet), and end-to-end behavior against a live backend (all web tests run against fakes).

looseEnds.title: Untracked docs
looseEnds.detail: docs/roadmap-learner-app-and-content.md and docs/walkthrough.html are untracked — commit or discard before they get lost.

looseEnds.title: 18 commits unpushed on main
looseEnds.detail: The branch is 18 commits ahead of its remote.

looseEnds.title: Learners see zero practice examples
looseEnds.detail: Practice test cases are entirely hidden on the learner path — the backend has no 'learner-visible test case' marker yet. Deliberate, but a content-quality gap.

looseEnds.title: Post-submit explanations/grading unavailable
looseEnds.detail: The reader treats them as unavailable — that's the deferred attempt/grading phase, not a bug.

nextSteps.title: Wire the reader to the learner projections
nextSteps.detail: Replace buildDummyActivity in lesson-reader.tsx and the test view with getLearnerQuiz/Practice/Test from web/src/lib/course-api/server. Everything is staged (contract, BFF methods, regression tests); it's the only thing between 'demo' and 'real product'. Spec: docs/learner-safe-read-projections.md §Web BFF Handoff.

nextSteps.title: Load real course material (Phase C1)
nextSteps.detail: Run the import pipeline to publish an actual course. Until real content exists the reader can't be honestly evaluated; it also unblocks visual polish against design/course.html.

nextSteps.title: Commit the stray docs and push main
nextSteps.detail: Cheap, and removes the risk of losing the roadmap that defines this whole arc.

notYet: Learner attempts/grading/progress (explicitly deferred to a later phase), per-learner auth (token is the sole gate by decision #3), and a web authoring console (instructor authoring stays on the CLI this arc).
